---
title: "Experiment Results Analysis"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
baseline = read.csv("comp4329baseline.csv")
q1 = read.csv("comp4329xavierq1.csv")
q2 = read.csv("comp4329sgdmomentumq2.csv")
q3 = read.csv("comp4329leakyReLUq3.csv")
```

# Experiment 1

```{r}
q1_data = bind_rows(
  baseline %>% mutate(Dataset = "Kaiming (Baseline)"),
  q1 %>% mutate(Dataset = "Xavier")
)

q1_data_long <- q1_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Loss", "F1", "EM"),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

q1_data_long$Step <- as.numeric(q1_data_long$Step)

ggplot(q1_data_long, aes(x = Step, y = Value, color = Dataset, group = Dataset)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  # scales = "free_y" is crucial since Loss and F1/EM are on different scales
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Model Performance Metrics",
    subtitle = "Xavier vs Kaiming Initialisation",
    x = "Training Steps",
    y = "Score / Loss"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.5,1,0,1), "cm")) + 
  theme(text = element_text(family = "CMU Serif"))

ggsave("experiment1.png", width = 9, height = 5)
```

# Experiment 1

```{r}
q2_data = bind_rows(
  baseline %>% mutate(Dataset = "Adam (Baseline)"),
  q2 %>% mutate(Dataset = "SGD with Momentum")
)

q2_data_long <- q2_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Loss", "F1", "EM"),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

q2_data_long$Step <- as.numeric(q2_data_long$Step)

ggplot(q2_data_long, aes(x = Step, y = Value, color = Dataset, group = Dataset)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  # scales = "free_y" is crucial since Loss and F1/EM are on different scales
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Model Performance Metrics",
    subtitle = "Adam vs SGD with Momentum Optimiser",
    x = "Training Steps",
    y = "Score / Loss"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.5,1,0,1), "cm")) + 
  theme(text = element_text(family = "CMU Serif"))

ggsave("experiment2.png", width = 9, height = 5)
```

# Experiment 3

```{r}
q3_data = bind_rows(
  baseline %>% mutate(Dataset = "ReLU (Baseline)"),
  q3 %>% mutate(Dataset = "Leaky ReLU")
)

q3_data_long <- q3_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Loss", "F1", "EM"),
    names_to = "Metric",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

q3_data_long$Step <- as.numeric(q3_data_long$Step)

ggplot(q3_data_long, aes(x = Step, y = Value, color = Dataset, group = Dataset)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  # scales = "free_y" is crucial since Loss and F1/EM are on different scales
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Model Performance Metrics",
    subtitle = "ReLU vs Leaky ReLU Activation Function",
    x = "Training Steps",
    y = "Score / Loss"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.5,1,0,1), "cm")) + 
  theme(text = element_text(family = "CMU Serif"))

ggsave("experiment3.png", width = 9, height = 5)
```
